title: Introduction to Physical AI
text:
Course Overview
This course introduces the core ideas behind Physical AI, covering how embodied systems sense, move, reason, plan, learn, and interact with the physical world. The lectures connect classical robotics foundations with modern data-driven learning methods and discuss practical applications and societal impact.
